name: Residential Tree Work Contract
scope: Tree removal, pruning, debris removal, stump grinding, and cleanup for residential properties.

sections.title: Scope of Work
sections.body: Contractor will perform tree work as described in the attached scope, including removal, pruning, debris cleanup, and stump grinding if selected.

sections.title: Property Access
sections.body: Client agrees to provide access to the work area, including gates, driveways, and any locked areas.

sections.title: Liability & Insurance
sections.body: Contractor carries full liability insurance. Contractor is not responsible for pre-existing damage or hidden defects.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.body: Payment is due upon job completion unless otherwise agreed. Deposits and credit card fees may apply.
